item.title: bear-reality
item.description: (References a conversation I had with my high-school literature teacher, Marjan Mossamaparast) Bear reality. Don’t drink. Don’t do drugs. (Alcohol will be looked back on as cigarettes anyway) Reality has so much more to offer swim in cold water eat spicy chilli (get a bit high) get heartbroken run a marathon Note: but obviously, you should do these things a few times.

item.title: she was abrasive
item.description: just use the green side (of the sponge) she would say. I think that said a lot. she was quite abrasive.

item.title: focus
item.description: focus doesn’t do it justice it shouldn’t really be mentally taxing it should be out of your control - like a hallucination.

item.title: anxiety
item.description: richard brand the secret? honestly a) come to terms with the fact that we are all going to die the same death one day. Then come back into the real world, and transmute your anixiety into ACTION.

item.title: chilli
item.description: the chilli theory is just a variant of the cold ocean theory maybe life can be summarized by one decision; you’re at the beach with your friends it’s windy, and freezing do you jump into ...

item.title: Don't say sorry
item.description: Mehdi - “Don’t say sorry. Just stop doing it.”.

item.title: selfless
item.description: People. Love. To talk. about. themselves.
